name: Feature request

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact

- [ ] This would improve backup performance
- [ ] This would improve reliability
- [ ] This would improve usability
- [ ] This would add new functionality

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples here.
